allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('public_repos:', d.get\('public_repos'\)\); print\('created_at:', d.get\('created_at'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; e=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=set\(n for ev in e if \(n:=ev.get\('repo',{}\).get\('name'\)\) and not n.startswith\('rioivano/'\)\); print\('count:', len\(s\)\)")

PowerShell($tools = @\("magick","inkscape","rsvg-convert"\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "FOUND: $t -> $\($c.Source\)" } else { "missing: $t" } }; "node sharp:"; node -e "try{require.resolve\('sharp'\);console.log\('sharp available'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('no sharp'\)}" 2>$null)
